name: ZipCheckup U.S. Water Quality Dataset
description: Water quality violations, lead/copper levels, radon zones, and Home Safety Scores for U.S. ZIP codes. Based on EPA SDWIS data.
source: U.S. EPA Safe Drinking Water Information System (SDWIS)

fields.lead_level_mg_l: 90th percentile lead level (mg/L), null if no data
fields.copper_level_mg_l: 90th percentile copper level (mg/L), null if no data
fields.radon_zone: EPA radon zone (1=highest, 3=lowest), null if no data
fields.home_safety_score: Composite score 0-100, null if insufficient data
fields.health_contaminant_names: Semicolon-separated list of health-based contaminant names
fields.ccr_contaminant_count: Number of contaminants reported in Consumer Confidence Report (CCR), null if no CCR data
fields.ccr_violation_count: Number of violations reported in CCR, null if no CCR data
fields.enforcement_action_count: Total EPA/state enforcement actions against the water system
fields.enforcement_health_violations: Number of health-based violations from enforcement records
fields.has_active_issues: Whether the system has currently active enforcement or violation issues (true/false)
fields.boil_water_advisories: Number of boil water advisories issued
